old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-txxf","title":"EDHOC: build_sig_structure ext_aad buffer too small for large credentials","description":"CORRECTNESS: build_sig_structure uses fixed 96-byte buffer for ext_aad which could overflow with larger credentials.

Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:229

uint8_t ext_aad[96];  // Fixed size
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ext, th, 32);      // 32 + ~3 = 35 bytes
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ext, cred, cred_len);  // cred_len + ~3 bytes

Current usage with 32-byte raw pubkeys as cred:
- TH: 32 bytes + 2 byte CBOR header = 34
- CRED: 32 bytes + 2 byte CBOR header = 34
- Total: ~68 bytes, fits in 96

If credentials are larger (e.g., full X.509 certs per RFC 9528):
- Typical X.509 cert: 500-2000 bytes
- Would overflow 96-byte buffer

The function doesn't validate cred_len against buffer capacity.

Impact: Stack buffer overflow if function is used with larger credentials.

Fix: Either validate cred_len <= (96 - 35) or use dynamic/larger buffer.

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:229","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:48.949504Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:48.949531Z"}

uint8_t ext_aad[96];  // Fixed size
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ext, th, 32);      // 32 + ~3 = 35 bytes
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_ext, cred, cred_len);  // cred_len + ~3 bytes

Current usage with 32-byte raw pubkeys as cred:
- TH: 32 bytes + 2 byte CBOR header = 34
- CRED: 32 bytes + 2 byte CBOR header = 34
- Total: ~68 bytes, fits in 96

If credentials are larger (e.g., full X.509 certs per RFC 9528):
- Typical X.509 cert: 500-2000 bytes
- Would overflow 96-byte buffer

The function doesn't validate cred_len against buffer capacity.

Impact: Stack buffer overflow if function is used with larger credentials.

Fix: Either validate cred_len <= (96 - 35) or use dynamic/larger buffer.

new_value: Increased ext_aad[96] to ext_aad[512] in build_sig_structure. Supports full credentials (X.509 certs per RFC 9528) without overflow. Current 32-byte creds unchanged. ZCBOR checks prevent encode errors.
